penalties.description: Cannot determine if task was completed as the final frames show marketing content rather than completion of suturing and cutting.

consensus_score.reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude reports incomplete task due to marketing content obscuring completion, while GPT reports completed task with penalties. Given that incomplete_task is an automatic zero condition and Claude's reasoning about marketing content is specific and verifiable, the incomplete assessment takes precedence per rubric hierarchy.

disagreements.rationale: If task completion cannot be verified due to video content issues, the completion time becomes moot as incomplete_task penalty applies automatic zero score.

Incomplete_task is an automatic zero condition that supersedes all other penalties. Claude's specific observation about marketing content preventing completion verification is more conservative and rubric-aligned.
If completion cannot be verified due to video content issues, the suture_cut phase should not be included in detected phases.
Incomplete_task penalty results in automatic zero score regardless of time or other penalties.
